request_payload.exposure_text: As a mom and small business owner, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks show we need to give our agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but we've seen how delays in the past have cost lives. We can't afford to wait when our families are at risk. #SecurityFirst #CommonSenseSafety
